channel.title: Reflections on The Learning Project
channel.description: Recent content in Reflections on The Learning Project

item.title: There will be a last time
item.description:
There will be a last time…

the last time you pick your son in your arms, lull him to sleep, and then slowly put him back in the bed

the last time you eat at your favorite restaurant and experience the familiarity of your senses

the last time you visit your favorite city, street and shop

item.title: Reflections from Robin Sharma
item.description:
13 lessons life has taught me

I’m in a reflective mood Ritesh Gupta and have been deconstructing what makes great leaders great and good humans strong. As part of my process, I’ve been considering the most valuable lessons I’ve learned from life. In the spirit of service and encouraging you to operate at your absolute best, I wanted to share 13 of them. So here you go:

#1. Excellent things happen to people who do excellent things.
